description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Simplified remote MCP setup for remote workspaces, including smoother auth and setup flows.
- Added richer desktop debug tooling with exportable diagnostics and sandbox probe report support.
Fixes & polish
- Improved Settings UX with config actions and report export improvements.
- Added MCP remote-connect end-to-end server test coverage.
- Included desktop development prerequisite sanity-check documentation updates.
Packaging / ops
- Updated AUR packaging metadata and PKGBUILD handling for this release.
- Bumped all OpenWork package versions to 0.11.134.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.133...v0.11.134
